widgetData.source_sentence: what is the purpose of a mood board
sentences: Antigua and Barbuda Antigua and Barbuda (/ænˈtiːɡə ənd bɑːrˈbjuːdə/ ( listen); an-TEE-gǝ ǝnd bar-BEW-dǝ) is a sovereign state in the Americas, lying between the Caribbean Sea and the Atlantic Ocean. It consists of two major islands, Antigua and Barbuda, and a number of smaller islands (including Great Bird, Green, Guiana, Long, Maiden and York Islands and further south, the island of Redonda). The permanent population numbers about 81,800 (at the 2011 Census) and the capital and largest port and city is St. John's, on Antigua.

Mood board Graphic designers, interior designers, industrial designers, photographers and other creative artists use mood boards to visually illustrate the style they wish to pursue. However, these boards can also be used by design professionals to visually explain a certain style of writing, or an imaginary setting for a storyline. In short, mood boards are not limited to visual subjects, but serve as a visual tool to quickly inform others of the overall "feel" (or "flow") of an idea.[citation needed] In creative processes, mood boards can balance coordination and creative freedom.[2]

Misophonia As of 2016 the literature on misophonia was limited.[1] Some small studies show that people with misophonia generally have strong negative feelings, thoughts, and physical reactions to specific sounds, which the literature calls "trigger sounds". These sounds are apparently usually soft, but can be loud. One study found that around 80% of the sounds were related to the mouth (eating, slurping, chewing or popping gum, whispering, etc.), and around 60% were repetitive. A visual trigger may develop related to the trigger sound.[1][3] It also appears that a misophonic reaction can occur in the absence of an actual sound.[1]

widgetData.source_sentence: Aloes, like most succulents, are very hardy and will withstand considerable neglect .
sentences: Another meaning behind this quote aside from probabilities of winning a theoretical battle is the importance of knowing/understanding others.

Some of the guys at my office have potted aloe plants.

widgetData.source_sentence: I can imagine a scenario where a single all powerful god create the universe that we know of.
sentences: It is the same idea as what Aristotle called the unmoved mover.
Age is not a PhD admission facor in the continental Europe, too.
People are sitting on benches.

widgetData.source_sentence: Via the move, the company aims annual savings of some EUR3m, the main part of which are expected to be realized this year.
sentences: The city has a new public transportation system.
The material for a large bridge construction project has been prepared and is being transported.
A company will announce quarterly earnings.
